query:
-- Count paid this week using paidAt (correct column)
SELECT COUNT(*) as paid_this_week_paidAt
FROM reimbursement_items
WHERE status = 'paid'
  AND paidAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY);

-- Also count using createdAt and updatedAt for comparison
SELECT COUNT(*) as paid_this_week_updatedAt
FROM reimbursement_items
WHERE status = 'paid'
  AND updatedAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY);

-- Total paid
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_paid FROM reimbursement_items WHERE status = 'paid';

-- Status breakdown
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM reimbursement_items GROUP BY status;
